## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.3 Apple M2 / Windows 11 |
| Refinex Terminal version | e.g. v0.1.0 |
| Rust version | `rustc --version` output |
| AI CLI tool | e.g. Claude Code v1.x |
| Shell | e.g. zsh / bash / PowerShell |

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces.
